layers.name: Stop paying per booking. Own your agency's entire travel platform.
layers.content: Why sell  under someone else's name when you can Build your Own Travel system

layers.name: MaqsoodTravel gives IATA-certified travel agencies a fully branded booking platform. Multi-source search across Sabre, Amadeus and Travelport, zero per-booking fees, and complete ownership of your inventory. Your agents. Your clients. Your system.
layers.content: MaqsoodTravel gives IATA-certified travel agencies a fully branded booking platform. Multi-source search across Sabre, Amadeus and Travelport, zero per-booking fees, and complete ownership of your inventory. Your agents. Your clients. Your system.

layers.name: Agencies save an average of $1,200/month in platform fee within their first month of going live.
layers.content: Agencies save an average of $1,200/month in platform fee within their first month of going live.

layers.name: heading
layers.content: The industry charges you for every move you make.

layers.name: subtitle
layers.content: The travel industry runs on a broken model. Your agency is paying the price.

layers.name: heading
layers.content: Agents juggle multiple travel platforms to quote one fare.

layers.name: body
layers.content: Agents waste hours toggling between Sabre, Amadeus, Travelport, losing deals while competitors quote instantly.

layers.name: heading
layers.content: Agencies pay heavily for 3rd party tools they'll never own.

layers.name: body
layers.content: Each booking enriches the platform, not you. Rising per-segment fees & IATA overhead eat your margin on tickets.

layers.name: heading
layers.content: GDS - airline disputes become your crisis

layers.name: body
layers.content: Policy disputes and NDC content blackouts turn into your crisis. Your bookings disappear when others fight.

layers.name: From contract to booking in three steps.
layers.content: From contract to booking in three steps.

layers.name: We handle the technical complexity. Your agents just search and book.
layers.content: We handle the technical complexity. Your agents just search and book.

layers.name: We plug into your GDS & NDC contracts.
layers.content: We plug into your GDS & NDC contracts.

layers.name: You keep your Sabre, Amadeus or Travelport agreements & we configure the platform in week one. No new contracts. No renegotiation. NDC connections added automatically.
layers.content: You keep your Sabre, Amadeus or Travelport agreements & we configure the platform in week one. No new contracts. No renegotiation. NDC connections added automatically.

layers.name: Your agents type the route once. The platform fires parallel queries to all connected GDS and NDC sources at the same millisecond. Average fare saving vs single-GDS: ~23%.
layers.content: Your agents type the route once. The platform fires parallel queries to all connected GDS and NDC sources at the same millisecond. Average fare saving vs single-GDS: ~23%.

layers.name: Book, and analyse: one branded portal.
layers.content: Book, and analyse: one branded portal.

layers.name: Everything inside your white-label platform. Book fares, issue tickets, set price alerts, pull reports under your own brand. Your data in your database. No shared logins. Full ownership.
layers.content: Everything inside your white-label platform. Book fares, issue tickets, set price alerts, pull reports under your own brand. Your data in your database. No shared logins. Full ownership.

layers.name: subtitle
layers.content: Every feature engineered by aviation industry veterans who understand what you actually need.

layers.name: body
layers.content: Pull live inventory from GDS and NDC simultaneously. One search surfaces every available fare — no source left behind.

layers.name: body
layers.content: Fire searches across all connected airlines at once. Sub-second results, zero tab-switching.

layers.name: body
layers.content: Search, book, hold, void, reissue — every ticketing action in one seamless workflow.

layers.name: body
layers.content: Save frequent route segments for instant repeat searches. Built for corporate travel desks.

layers.name: body
layers.content: Auto-detect duplicate PNRs and policy violations before they trigger costly ADM penalties.

layers.name: body
layers.content: Role-based access for agents and admins. Manage your team without IT dependency.

layers.name: tagline
layers.content: Aviation-grade infrastructure, ready in weeks, not years.

layers.name: quote
layers.content: “We were paying for three separate tools that barely talked to each other. MaqqsedTravel replaced all of them. Our agents now search every GDS from one screen, under our own brand. We were live in under 6 weeks.”

layers.name: "Switching off Amadeus felt risky. MaqqsedTravel had us connected to Sabre, NDC and Travelport in week one. We kept our existing contracts — nothing changed for our clients."
